finding: The dashboard listed paper_current_truth_refresh_report.json as a source artifact, but portfolio truth selection could still fall back to stale summary display before consuming the fresh PAPER refresh output.
patch: Portfolio truth selection now prefers audited current evidence first, then a scoped PAPER current-truth refresh report, then stale summary display. Invalid refresh permission drift is converted to BLOCKED display truth with live and scale flags false.
acceptance_conditions: Fresh scoped PAPER current-truth refresh can drive portfolio cash/equity/PnL display when summary is stale
Stale refresh remains stale display-only and does not prove runtime continuity
Refresh permission drift fails closed as BLOCKED without live/scale permission
Audited writer and LIVE_READY remain blocked
Open contract gap count remains 13 and live/scale flags remain false
blockers_removed: Dashboard no longer ignores fresh PAPER current-truth refresh when summary.json is stale
Refresh permission drift now maps to an explicit blocked portfolio truth state
